title: GBP Situations
assignees: Clayton Coombs, Ethan Vandenberg, Mikey King
description:
Here is the most recent update from the client. I jumped on a quick call with him and he walked me through what is going on and them provided me with the following email.

"
So I have (4) Locations.

Rancho Cucamonga - Good & Verified. No Issues
Victorville (Ends in 5151) - Good & Verified. No Isses.
Wrightwood (Ends in 7354) - Good & Verified. This is a new Page made by SocialOrdeals a couple weeks back. I will add you guys.
Redlands - Problem.

--------------------

Redlands - This is my problem child. Google flagged it and said I needed to submit a Video of it inside and out, which I did. They then came back and said they need another Video inside the building showing people working and a cash register and stuff. However this is the one that keeps getting changed.

I signed up with a company called TryNinja to optimize the GBP and only gave them access to this one. I recently cancelled them and you guys took away their access but something is in there and keeps changing the operating hours, pictures, address and other stuff. I have no idea who or why as TryNinja isnt in there anymore and its just you guys with access. I definitely dont make any changes.

Im going to try and go back and take a better Video inside and see if they accept it. If they dont then this GBP will fall off unfortunately. We need to figure out how to get this Verified and if theres a plugin or something on here, unless Google is making the changes.

------------------

Wrightwood (3 Pages)

Suspended Ending in 6264 - I made this page, Google Flagged and Suspended it 3 days later. I uploaded the Video to Verify it including my Lease Agreement and Utility Bills and it still is suspended over a month later. We can Delete this page.

Verified Ending in 7354 - Social Ordeals Created this 2 weeks ago and it Auto Verified as has been up with no Issues so leave this one. I invited you to be manager here.

Duplicate Ending in 1271 - Ad Leverage made this 2 months ago and couldnt get it Verified. They needed me to go Verify it and somewhere along the way someone Hit Duplicate so it Duplicated with my Victorville main page. Id say lets be cautious and leave this alone for now while we work on the others."

title: Location/GBP Phone Numbers and Website Footer Numbers
description:
Hey ,
 
As previously mentioned, the phone numbers across GBP and the site require some cleaning up. 

In the footer on the site, all of the locations' numbers are being swapped to the same number.

In the back end, hard-coded on-site, the locations are using some of the same numbers.

On the GBPs, some of the locations are using the same numbers.

We would recommend getting set up with our Ideal GBP Phone Number Structure:


CLIXSY’s Recommended Ideal GBP Structure: 

PRIMARY - GBP Call Tracking Number (specific to that GBP)
- If no GBP call tracking, use the local number.

SECONDARY - Local Number (specific to that location)
- Should also match the phone number on site (the number associated with the NAP in the footer and/or alongside the location's map embeds, etc. - can be hard-coded if call swapping is set up) in order to correlate the site and GBP for Google.
- Number we use for location’s citation building

ADDITIONAL SECONDARY - Main Business Number 
– (optional and can be the same across locations) 



FOOTER HARD-CODED NUMBERS:

These should be the location's local numbers
Wrightwood
(760) 243-4440

Rancho Cucamonga
(951) 405-0150

Victorville
(760) 243-4440

Redlands 
(951) 405-0150



GBP PHONE NUMBERS:

Wrightwood
Primary - (760) 243-4440

Rancho Cucamonga
Primary - (951) 783-3745
Secondary - (951) 405-0150

Victorville
Primary - (760) 474-5776
Secondary - (760) 243-4440

Redlands
Primary - (760) 243-4440  (Live front end currently - (760) 388-0584)
Secondary - (760) 684-9661
